hero.title: BUILDING SCALABLE, TYPE-SAFE WEB APPS WITH NEXT.JS
hero.subtitle: Specialist in AI-driven platforms, RAG architectures, and complex workflow automation.

intro.headline: Full-stack developer specializing in digital transformation and AI integration. I bridge the gap between sophisticated backend logic and refined user experiences. Using the T3 stack (Next.js, Prisma, NeonDB) combined with AI Vercel SDK and RAG architectures, I build autonomous systems that don’t just display data — they understand it. From custom AI chatbots to voice agents with Retell AI and ElevenLabs, I transform complex business requirements into elegant, automated web platforms that drive efficiency.

personal-banker-app.title: Personal Banker
personal-banker-app.shortOverview: A proactive Fintech ecosystem that automates investment lifecycle management and market intelligence through agentic AI and omnichannel notifications.

keyFeatures.featDescription: Eliminates manual tracking with an automated multi-stage alerting system. Users receive scheduled maturity notifications (30, 7, and 1 day prior) and a comprehensive monthly digest of expiring assets via Email and Telegram.

A sophisticated AI assistant using Vercel AI Gateway to interface with multiple LLMs (Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek). It uses RAG to answer portfolio-specific queries and Tavily for real-time market research beyond the user's data.

A background engine using Cheerio and Cron jobs to monitor the National Bank of Moldova (bnm.md). It tracks inflation and base rate shifts, providing a live benchmark against the user's current portfolio ROI.

A complex financial simulator using Recharts to visualize long-term wealth growth. It incorporates dynamic variables such as inflation indexing, tax rates, and one-time financial events to provide high-fidelity ROI projections.

Features a high-performance 3D 'Thinking Orb' built with React Three Fiber (Three.js) that visualizes the AI's processing states, complemented by fluid Framer Motion transitions for a sleek, modern fintech experience.

personal-banker-app.detailedOverview: Personal Banker is a high-performance Fintech platform, designed to replace legacy tracking methods with a unified, AI-driven command center. A core technical highlight is the AI Orchestration layer: using the Vercel AI SDK and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), the system indexes the user's investment database, allowing for complex natural language queries. The front-end experience is elevated by an interactive 3D 'Thinking Orb' and dynamic Recharts dashboards that allow users to assess their entire financial position in the blink of an eye. The Analytics Suite instantly calculates critical KPIs — including total portfolio value in multiple currencies, monthly net income, and asset distribution by type — while the backend utilizes Cheerio-based web scrapers and Cron jobs to keep the system synchronized with the National Bank of Moldova's live market data.
personal-banker-app.challengeAndSolutionDescription: The primary challenge was the 'fragmented portfolio' syndrome, where critical investment data and maturity dates were scattered across various bank accounts, leading to missed reinvestment windows and inaccurate ROI assessments. I solved this by engineering a proactive intelligence layer that centralizes lifecycle management. By implementing a multi-stage alerting system (30/7/1-day notifications), the platform eliminates manual monitoring. The solution transforms a passive spreadsheet into an active financial advisor that not only calculates total wealth in real-time across multiple currencies but also contextually benchmarks personal performance against national inflation and interest rates, ensuring proactive wealth preservation.

ai-journalist-1tv.title:
AI Journalist:
1TV Moldova
ai-journalist-1tv.shortOverview: An autonomous content engine that scrapes, synthesizes, and beautifies a weekly 7-day cultural digest, delivering multi-modal (Text & Audio) insights directly to the inbox.

keyFeatures.featDescription: A robust extraction engine using Puppeteer to navigate dynamic SPAs. It simulates human behavior by handling infinite scrolls and interacting with Livewire 'Load More' buttons across 4 major cultural platforms (Afisha, iTicket, etc.).

An advanced LLM chain where Agent 1 drafts the narrative script in a specific '1TV Moldova' brand voice, Agent 2 generates high-fidelity voiceovers via ElevenLabs, and Agent 3 acts as a specialized HTML/CSS developer for layout.

Integrates an image-processing pipeline that fetches binary data from concert flyers. This allows the AI to 'see' and extract artistic moods, artist names, and atmospheric sub-text not found in the website's raw metadata.

A dedicated AI-driven design layer that transforms raw text into a professional, mobile-optimized HTML newsletter. It enforces strict inline-CSS styling and image constraints for perfect rendering in Gmail and Outlook.

Automates the final 'last mile' of delivery via the Gmail API, followed by a personalized Telegram notification containing the ElevenLabs audio summary and a status sign-off: 'Детка, работа для тебя проделана!'

ai-journalist-1tv.detailedOverview: The AI Journalist is a high-efficiency production pipeline designed to replace hours of manual research with a 10-minute automated run. The system orchestrates a complex 'Two-Pass' scraping method: it first captures the broad event landscape before deep-diving into individual URLs to pull cast lists, plot summaries, and venue details. By leveraging Google Gemini's reasoning capabilities alongside a 'Gold Standard' reference sample, the workflow ensures every digest sounds like a professional cultural critic. The project showcases the power of Agentic workflows where one AI writes the story, another speaks it, and a third designs the envelope it arrives in.
ai-journalist-1tv.challengeAndSolutionDescription: The primary challenge was the high 'noise-to-signal' ratio and the fragmented nature of local event data, which usually takes a human over 2 hours to curate. I solved this by engineering a unified aggregator that normalizes disparate date formats (e.g., '25 Martie' to ISO) and filters out irrelevant categories like cinema or sports. By implementing 'Human-Mimetic' interaction logic to bypass bot protections and adding a visual analysis layer for flyers, the solution transforms raw, messy web data into a polished, multi-modal cultural product delivered straight to the user's inbox with zero manual intervention.

event-automation-engine.title: Cultural Intelligence Scraper
event-automation-engine.shortOverview: An automated event aggregation system for local cultural events without manual search.

keyFeatures.featDescription: Filtering and categorizing events by date and location.

event-automation-engine.detailedOverview: An automated digest system for journalists that aggregates local events without manual intervention.
event-automation-engine.challengeAndSolutionDescription: Scraping dynamic sites often led to bot detection. By containerizing Puppeteer and using n8n logic, I created a detection-evading workflow.

mcp-server-exploration.title: Agentic AI Infrastructure
mcp-server-exploration.shortOverview: A deep-dive into the Model Context Protocol to understand how LLMs interact with local file systems and databases.

keyFeatures.featDescription: Deep analysis of Claude's MCP implementation.
Successful integration of local SQLite databases with AI agents.

mcp-server-exploration.detailedOverview: A deep-dive into the Model Context Protocol to understand how LLMs interact with local file systems and databases.
mcp-server-exploration.challengeAndSolutionDescription: The project focused on the 'under the hood' mechanics of agentic workflows. By building a custom MCP server from scratch, I gained a granular understanding of tool-calling protocols and context-window management.

residential-harmony.title: Residential Harmony
residential-harmony.shortOverview: A minimalist residential project focusing on natural light and geometric flow.

keyFeatures.featDescription: Maximizing usable area through modular furniture and clever storage solutions.
Strategic placement of windows and artificial lighting to enhance the mood.

residential-harmony.detailedOverview: Residential Harmony is a showcase of minimalist design principles applied to a family home. The goal was to create a sanctuary that feels open yet intimate.
residential-harmony.challengeAndSolutionDescription: The main challenge was the small footprint. I solved this by using a neutral color palette and floor-to-ceiling glass to create an illusion of space.

testimonials.heading: Some nice words from my past clients

testimonial1.name: Sarah Chen
testimonial1.quote: Natalia's expertise in both technical development and design created a beautiful, high-performing website that exceeded our expectations.

testimonial2.name: Marcus Rodriguez
testimonial2.quote: Natalia transformed our boutique coffee brand with a website that perfectly balances aesthetics and functionality. The results speak for themselves.

testimonial3.name: Emily Watson
testimonial3.quote: The collaborative process was amazing. Natalia brought lots of fresh perspectives and innovative solutions to our project.

questions.question: How long does it take to build a website?
questions.answer: It depends on the complexity of the website and the scope of the project.

questions.question: What is your development process like?
questions.answer: I follow a hands-on approach starting with project planning, building out the core features, and regular check-ins to make sure everything matches your needs.

questions.question: Do you work with international clients?
questions.answer: Yes, I work with clients globally and can accommodate different time zones for meetings and communication.

questions.question: What industries do you specialize in?
questions.answer: I have experience across various industries including technology, retail, hospitality, and professional services, bringing fresh perspectives to each project.

entries.title: Software Developer
contents: Enhanced application security and developed new features, adhering to standards set by the Passive Defense Organization and National Cyberspace Center.
Designed and implemented intuitive map interfaces using MapsUI, enhancing user experience and enabling seamless interactive map integration.
Developed applications for industrial automation, leveraging C++ and the Fatek API for PLC communication.
Enhanced responsiveness and usability of applications using Windows Forms and WPF frameworks.
Executed XML to SVG conversions using X-DOM, ensuring dynamic and efficient data visualization.

entries.title: Back-End Developer
contents: Engineered systems for large-scale data ingestion and analysis, ensuring efficient data processing and storage.
Developed back-end systems enabling vehicle-to-cloud communication for telemetry, diagnostics, and remote control:
✅ Implemented secure APIs, following ISO 26262 automotive safety standards.
✅ Ensured data privacy for customers and partners through industry-compliant protocols.
✅ Delivered remote features like over-the-air updates, real-time tracking, and remote start capabilities.

entries.title: Freelance Developer
contents: Created a personal portfolio using Three.js, React, Vite, and WebAPI to showcase technical expertise.
Continuously enhancing technical skills and expanding expertise in modern web development and back-end technologies.
